[PDF_PAGE 9 | score=5] Suddenly two more worms spring out at them because the DM feels the battle was far too easy. Cries of "Hey where'd they come from? I said I had my eyes peeled!" do not deter the attack. The suspension of disbelief is broken. Thm, the players have less fun and, in fact, are less likely to suspend disbelief for the sake of the game in future encom- ters.
